backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the backend canister for the Question Paper Generation System, providing CRUD operations for subjects, questions, and papers, plus paper generation logic with multiple sets.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (login page, dashboard, add questions, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON snippet summarizing the PaperPreviewPage component, which renders a generated question paper in academic layout with set switcher tabs and print/PDF functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a div with id 'root' and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with all application routes (login, dashboard, add/edit question, question bank, manage subjects, generate paper, generated papers, paper preview), including auth guards that redirect unauthenticated users.
Shared layout wrapper for authenticated pages that renders the Sidebar, a sticky top header with welcome message and user info, page content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Navigation sidebar component with links to all main app pages, a logout button, and a responsive mobile drawer with hamburger toggle.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor instance using TanStack Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous access, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for CRUD operations on subjects and questions, wrapping backend actor calls with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Poppins font, configuring Tailwind CSS, and defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddQuestionsPage.tsx: Page component for creating or editing a question, with a form supporting subject selection, category, difficulty, MCQ options, and correct answer fields.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview page displaying stat cards for subjects, questions, and generated papers counts, along with a category breakdown of questions.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratedPapersPage.t: Page that reads previously generated paper metadata from localStorage and displays them in a card grid with subject, marks, duration, and a link to preview each paper.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratePaperPage.tsx: Page for configuring and generating a new question paper by selecting a subject, exam duration, total marks, and question counts per category. On submission it calls the backend, stores paper metadata in localStorage, and navigates to the preview page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with email/password form that simulates authentication, stores a session in localStorage, optionally initializes the backend, and redirects to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ManageSubjectsPage.ts: CRUD page for managing subjects, displaying them in a table with add/edit dialogs and delete confirmation, backed by React Query hooks for backend calls.
frontend/src/pages/PaperPreviewPage.tsx: Preview page for a generated paper that loads metadata from localStorage, shuffles questions per set (A–E) using a seeded algorithm, and renders the paper with print/download controls.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionBankPage.tsx: Displays a filterable, searchable table of all questions with subject, category, and difficulty filters. Supports editing (via router navigation) and deleting questions with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, and animations (accordion, fade-in), plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for an Automatic Question Paper Generation System, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements across Login, Dashboard, Question Bank, and Paper Generation screens.
